use_cases: Hero section backgrounds for landing pages needing visual impact
Portfolio or showcase pages requiring abstract animated effects
Product demo pages wanting immersive visual environments
Creative agency websites needing distinctive animated backgrounds
Interactive experience entry points with fluid visual effects
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered liquid animation background component using Three.js that renders a full-screen, flowing liquid effect with metallic material properties. The component loads an external image and applies fluid displacement animations, creating an organic, wavy canvas effect suitable for immersive hero sections or decorative backgrounds.
